storage.description: Use cloud storage or database storage as a data source for labeling tasks or as a target storage for completed annotations.
storage.importDataFromCloudStorage: Import your data from cloud storage providers
storage.selectCloudStorageService: Select the cloud storage service where your data is stored
storage.storageTitleDescription: This name will help you identify this connection in your project
storage.storageTitlePlaceholder: Enter a descriptive name (e.g., 'Legal Documents', 'Training Data')
storage.canDeleteObjectsDescription: If unchecked, annotations will not be deleted from storage
storage.amazonS3Description: Configure your AWS S3 connection with all required Label Studio settings
storage.usePresignedUrls: Use pre-signed URLs (On) / Proxy through the platform (Off)
storage.usePresignedUrlsDescription: When pre-signed URLs are enabled, all data bypasses the platform and user browsers directly read data from storage
storage.redisStorageDescription: Configure your Redis storage connection with all required Label Studio settings
storage.googleCloudStorageDescription: Configure your Google Cloud Storage connection with all required Label Studio settings
storage.googleApplicationCredentialsDescription: Paste the contents of credentials.json in this field OR leave it blank to use ADC.
storage.googleProjectIdDescription: Leave blank to inherit from Google Application Credentials.
storage.azureBlobStorageDescription: Configure your Azure Blob Storage connection with all required Label Studio settings
storage.localFilesDescription: Configure your local file storage connection with all required Label Studio settings
storage.deleteStorageConfirmation: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
storage.tasksAddedHelp: {{count}} new tasks added during the last sync.
storage.tasksExistedHelp: {{count}} tasks that have been found and already synced will not be added to the project again.
storage.tasksTotalHelp: {{count}} tasks have been added in total for this storage.
storage.annotationsHelp: {{count}} annotations successfully saved during the last sync.
storage.totalAnnotationsHelp: {{count}} total annotations seen in the project at the sync moment.
storage.errorLogsFor: Error logs for {{exportPrefix}}{{type}} storage {{id}} in project {{project}} and job {{job}}
storage.troubleshootingTips: for troubleshooting tips on cloud storage connections.
storage.statusInitialized: Initialized: storage was added, but never synced; sufficient for starting URI link resolving
storage.statusQueued: Queued: sync job is in the queue, but not yet started
storage.statusInProgress: In progress: sync job is running
storage.statusFailed: Failed: sync job stopped, some errors occurred
storage.statusCompletedWithErrors: Completed with errors: sync job completed but some tasks had validation errors
storage.allTasksCompleted: All tasks in the queue have been completed

hotkeysManager.pleaseEnterJsonData: Please enter JSON data to import
hotkeysManager.invalidFormat: Invalid format: expected an array of hotkeys or an object with a hotkeys property

labelingConfig.documentationLink: read about the available tags in our documentation

apiToken.revokeConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this access token? Any application using this token will need a new token to be able to access Label Studio
apiToken.oneActiveTokenTooltip: You can only have one active token
apiToken.copyTokenInstructions: Copy your new access token from below and keep it secure.
apiToken.securityWarning: Do not share this key with anyone. If you suspect any keys have been compromised, you should revoke them and create new ones.
apiToken.deleteTokenConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this token? This action cannot be undone.

tokenSettings.enableLegacyTokens: Enable legacy access tokens, these do not expire
tokenSettings.ttlDescription: The number of days, after creation, that the token will be valid for. After this time period a user will need to create a new access token
tokenSettings.description: Configure global settings for API tokens
tokenSettings.title: Token Settings

generalSettings.title: General Settings
generalSettings.workspaceDescription: Simplify project management by organizing projects into workspaces. Learn more
generalSettings.sequentialDescription: Tasks are ordered by Task ID
generalSettings.randomDescription: Tasks are chosen with uniform random
generalSettings.uncertaintyDescription: Tasks are chosen according to model uncertainty score (active learning mode). Learn more

emptyState.title: Import data to get your project started
emptyState.description: Connect your cloud storage or upload files from your computer

retrievePredictions.title: Retrieve Predictions
retrievePredictions.text:
Send the selected tasks to all ML backends connected to the project.

This operation might be abruptly interrupted due to a timeout. The recommended way to get predictions is to update tasks using the Label Studio API.

Please confirm your action.

createAnnotationsFromPredictions.title: Create Annotations From Predictions
createAnnotationsFromPredictions.text: Create annotations from predictions using selected predictions set for each selected task. Your account will be assigned as an owner to those annotations.

removeDuplicatedTasks.title: Remove Duplicated Tasks
removeDuplicatedTasks.text: Confirm that you want to remove duplicated tasks with the same data fields. Duplicated tasks will be deleted and all annotations will be moved to the first task from duplicated tasks. Also Source Storage Links will be restored if at least one duplicated task has a storage link. Warning: Task assignments (enterprise only) won't be saved.

deleteTasks.title: Delete selected tasks?
deleteTasks.text:
You are about to delete the selected tasks.

This can't be undone.

deleteAnnotations.title: Delete selected annotations?
deleteAnnotations.text:
You are about to delete the selected annotations.

This can't be undone.

labelingConfiguration.title: You're almost there!
labelingConfiguration.text: Before you can annotate the data, set up labeling configuration

dialogs.deleteWarning:
You are about to delete the selected {{objectType}}.

This can't be undone.

emptyState.tasksAssignedWillAppear: Tasks assigned to you will appear here

labelingInstructions.title: Labeling Instructions
labelingInstructions.description1: Write instructions to help users complete labeling tasks.
labelingInstructions.description2: The instruction field supports HTML markup and it allows use of images, iframes (pdf).

prelabeling.description: Enable and select which set of predictions to use for prelabeling.
prelabeling.selectModel: Select which predictions or which model you want to use:

predictionsSettings.title: Predictions

predictionsList.title: Predictions List
predictionsList.description: List of predictions available in the project. Each card is associated with a separate model version. To learn about how to import predictions,

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Predictions
deleteConfirm.body: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?

predictionsList.undefinedVersionTooltip: Model version is undefined. Likely means that model_version field was missing when predictions were imported.

emptyState.title: No predictions yet uploaded
emptyState.description: Predictions could be used to prelabel the data, or validate the model. You can upload and select predictions from multiple model versions. You can also connect live models in the Model tab.
emptyState.learnMore: Learn more on how to upload predictions in our docs

predictionsSettings.description: Configure display and behavior of machine learning predictions

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Perform these actions at your own risk. Actions you take on this page can't be reverted. Make sure your data is backed up.

confirmation.title: Action confirmation
confirmation.body: You're about to delete all things. This action cannot be undone.

resetCache.label: Reset Cache
resetCache.help: Reset Cache may help in cases like if you are unable to modify the labeling configuration due to validation errors concerning existing labels, but you are confident that the labels don't exist. You can use this action to reset the cache and try again.

dropTabs.label: Drop All Tabs
dropTabs.help: If the Data Manager is not loading, dropping all Data Manager tabs can help.

deleteProject.label: Delete Project
deleteProject.help: Deleting a project removes all tasks, annotations, and project data from the database.

dangerZone.deleteAllAnnotationsDescription: Delete all annotations in this project
dangerZone.deleteProjectDescription: Permanently delete this project and all its data
dangerZone.typeProjectName: Please enter project name to confirm

emptyState.title: Let's connect your first model
emptyState.description: Connect a machine learning model to generate predictions. These predictions can be compared side by side, used for efficient pre‒labeling and, to aid in active learning, directing users to the most impactful labeling tasks.
emptyState.learnMore: Learn more about connecting models in our docs

instructions.intro: A connected model has been detected! If you wish to fetch predictions from this model, please follow these steps:
instructions.step3: 3. Click on Batch predictions from the Actions menu.
instructions.prelabelingNote: If you want to use the model predictions for prelabeling, please configure this in the

autoTraining.label: Start model training on annotation submission
autoTraining.description: This option will send a request to /train with information about annotations. You can use this to enable an Active Learning loop. You can also manually start training through model menu in its card.

form.name: Name
form.extraParams: Any extra params to pass during model connection
form.interactiveDescription: If enabled some labeling tools will send requests to the ML Backend interactively during the annotation process.

autoTraining.label: Start model training when annotation is submitted
autoTraining.description: This option will send a request with annotation information to /train. You can use this feature to enable active learning loop. You can also start training manually from the model menu in the model card.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the webhook? This action cannot be undone.
webhooks.footerDescription1: Webhooks allow external services to be notified when certain events happen. When the specified events occur, a POST request is sent to each of the URLs you provide.
